description: Claude embedded in Palantir Maven Smart System processed satellite imagery signals intelligence and surveillance feeds in real-time across classified military networks.
On the first day of Operation Epic Fury Claude generated ~1000 prioritized targets with precise GPS coordinates and weapons recommendations from synthesized multi-source intelligence.
tech_stack: LLM Reasoning, Geospatial AI, Decision Trees

description: Claude auto-generated legal justifications for each strike target under international humanitarian law — a controversial use of GenAI for compliance in lethal operations.
Trump banned Anthropic via executive order hours before strikes began over refusal to allow unrestricted military use. OpenAI and xAI moved in to fill the gap.
